svg.title: PMO data ingestion functional flow
svg.desc: Functional flowchart showing how PMO data is extracted from Azure DevOps via MCP API, scheduled in batches, transformed, and loaded into Vector DB, Neo4j Graph DB, and Metastore.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What PMO data entities live in Azure DevOps?')
g.text: Projects · FTE · cost · milestones · work items

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the MCP API connector authenticate with Azure DevOps?')
sendPrompt('How is the batch schedule configured — daily, weekly?')
sendPrompt('What transformations happen before loading — normalisation, deduplication?')
sendPrompt('What data goes into the Vector DB — which fields are embedded?')
sendPrompt('What nodes and relationships does Neo4j store for PMO data?')
sendPrompt('What does the Metastore catalog — schema, lineage, raw snapshots?')
sendPrompt('What happens after a successful batch load — logging, alerts?')
